event.name: REWRITE
event.reminderMessage: Don't forget! ICC Youth Invitation Service — Rewrite starts in 1 hour!

hero.title: Rewrite
hero.subtitle: God Can Rewrite Your Story
hero.quoteText: Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.description: We are a vibrant community of young believers passionate about knowing God, finding purpose, and making a difference. Our youth ministry provides a safe, welcoming space for young people to grow spiritually, build meaningful friendships, and discover their God-given potential.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To raise a generation of young leaders who are rooted in God's Word, filled with the Holy Spirit, and equipped to impact their schools, communities, and the world for Christ.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To reach young people with the gospel, disciple them in their faith, connect them in meaningful community, and empower them for service and leadership in God's kingdom.

welcomeMessage.title: A Message For You
welcomeMessage.message: Whether you're new to faith, searching for answers, or looking to deepen your relationship with God — you are welcome here. Come as you are. Encounter God. Find your people. Rewrite your story.
welcomeMessage.author: ICC Youth Ministry

whyAttend.title: Relevant Bible-Based Messages
whyAttend.description: Experience powerful, practical teachings that speak directly to the challenges and questions young people face today — all grounded in God's Word.

whyAttend.title: Meaningful Friendships
whyAttend.description: Connect with other young believers who share your faith, values, and desire for authentic relationships that go beyond surface level.

whyAttend.title: Worship and Prayer
whyAttend.description: Encounter God's presence through heartfelt worship, prayer, and a spiritual atmosphere that transforms lives and renews minds.

whyAttend.title: Fun Activities and Events
whyAttend.description: Enjoy a lively, engaging environment with icebreakers, fellowship games, and activities designed to build connection and create lasting memories.

whyAttend.title: Personal Spiritual Growth
whyAttend.description: Take the next step in your faith journey through discipleship, mentoring, and practical tools for building a strong spiritual foundation.

whatsToExpect.heading: THE
whatsToExpect.description: A typical service runs approximately 2 hours with a flow designed to help you encounter God and connect with others.

items.title: Worship
items.description: An opening session of spirited praise and worship to set the atmosphere and invite God's presence.

items.title: Welcome & Icebreaker
items.description: A warm welcome to all guests followed by fun icebreaker activities to help everyone feel connected.

items.title: The Message
items.description: A relevant, Bible-based message delivered to inspire, challenge, and transform young lives.

items.title: Fellowship
items.description: Small group discussions and prayer time to process the message and build community.

items.title: Refreshments
items.description: Light snacks and drinks served as we continue connecting and building relationships.

speaker.name: BRO. FELIX
speaker.title: Youth Minister & Speaker
speaker.bio: Bro. Felix is a passionate youth minister dedicated to reaching the next generation with the transformative power of God's Word. With years of experience in youth ministry, he brings energy, wisdom, and a prophetic edge to every message he delivers. His heart is to see young people experience genuine life change and walk in their God-given purpose.

highlights.heading: Event Highlights

quote.text: Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind.
quote.author: Romans 12:2

scripture.text: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.

keyTakeaways: Learn how to renew your mind according to God's Word
Discover your identity and purpose in Christ
Build lasting friendships with like-minded young believers
Experience the transforming power of worship and prayer
Leave equipped to impact your generation for Christ

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.testimony: This youth ministry changed my life. I came in broken and confused, but through the messages and the love of this community, I found my purpose in Christ.

testimonials.name: Joshua R.
testimonials.testimony: The worship here is incredible. I've never felt God's presence like this before. The friendships I've made are genuine and have helped me grow so much.

testimonials.name: Maria L.
testimonials.testimony: I was searching for meaning and found it here. The teachings are relevant to what I'm going through as a young person. This ministry feels like family.

testimonials.name: David K.
testimonials.testimony: Being part of this youth group has been the best decision I've made. The mentorship, the Bible studies, the fun activities — it's all helped shape who I am today.

faq.question: Is registration required?
faq.answer: Yes, registration is encouraged so we can prepare enough seating, materials, and refreshments for everyone. Walk-ins are welcome, but registration helps us serve you better.

faq.question: What should I bring?
faq.answer: Just bring yourself and an open heart! You may want to bring a Bible, a notebook, and a pen. We'll provide everything else including refreshments.

faq.question: Can I invite my friends?
faq.answer: Absolutely! In fact, we encourage it. This event is designed for young people, and there's nothing better than experiencing God's presence together with friends.

faq.question: Is there any registration fee?
faq.answer: No, this event is completely free. We believe the gospel is for everyone, and we never want finances to be a barrier to encountering God.

faq.question: What age group is this for?
faq.answer: Our youth ministry serves young people from high school through young adult — typically ages 13 to 30. Everyone is welcome regardless of where they are in their faith journey.

faq.question: What time should I arrive?
faq.answer: Doors open at 9:30 AM, 30 minutes before the service starts at 10:00 AM. Arriving early gives you time to check in, grab a seat, and enjoy the pre-service atmosphere.

registration.heading: Register For The Event
registration.description: Fill out the form below to secure your spot. Registration is free and helps us prepare for your coming.
registration.successMessage: Thank you for registering! We can't wait to see you at the event. Get ready for a life-changing experience!

address: Near Sathya Studio, Opp. Dr. MGR Janaki College,

contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you
